mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_download (material_id, user_id, source, create_time) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{userId}, #{source}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS value FROM material_download GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT mi.title AS name, COUNT(md.id) AS value FROM material_download md LEFT JOIN material_info mi ON mi.id = md.material_id GROUP BY md.material_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5
